summary: E2E plan covers all 6 E2E cases (TC-USER-100..105) with selectors grounded in web/src/views/system/user/index.vue, deterministic data lifecycle, idempotent cleanup, and network-event-based waits. .aws/data-knowledge.yaml exists; all referenced fixtures are present. Five non-blocking needs-review items are codegen-time UI verifications (CrudModal save text, modal title format) and a small helper addition (create_user_via_api) that mirrors the existing delete_user contract. No blockers. Codegen can proceed without guessing product behavior.

findings.message: Section 6.6 (TC-USER-105 pseudocode) contains a malformed expression: `expect(page.locator('.n-data-table-tbody tr')).to_have_count(1) ... if False else None` followed by a separate `assert rows_after_clear.count() > 1` block. The intent is clear (the count check should be the assert form) but the redundant ternary should be removed during codegen for cleanliness.
findings.suggestion: During Phase 7B codegen, emit only `rows_after_clear = page.locator('.n-data-table-tbody tr')` and `assert rows_after_clear.count() > 1`; drop the ternary stub. This is documented intent, not a logic gap.

needs_review.question: TC-USER-105 is P2; user scope explicitly says '全量 CRUD + 角色分配' which arguably excludes search. Keep TC-USER-105 in E2E codegen, or downgrade to skip-with-comment?
needs_review.reason: P2 inclusion requires reviewer ack per skill rule. Plan documents the choice (NR-E2E-PLAN-001) and recommends keeping due to low marginal cost. This is a scoping clarification, not a codegen blocker.

needs_review.question: Modal save button text/role assumed to be '确定' based on Naive UI default. Should codegen-time verification of web/src/components/table/CrudModal.vue be a planning blocker or remain a codegen-time gate?
needs_review.reason: Plan defers to codegen-time read of CrudModal.vue (G1 in e2e-codegen-plan.md §7). This is a deliberate, documented gate — not silent assumption. Naive UI's default ok-text is '确定' so risk of mismatch is low.

needs_review.question: Modal title format ('新增 用户' / '编辑 用户') assumed from useCRUD convention. Should the plan instead rely on modal-visibility-only scoping?
needs_review.reason: Plan documents both: §4.2 lists title selectors as primary; §8 failure-mode budget allows fallback to visibility-only. Codegen-time gate G2 will verify before emit.

needs_review.question: New helper create_user_via_api will be added to tests/e2e/scripts/user_data_setup.py. Should it instead reuse the API helper module (tests/api/helpers/user_api.py::create_user) via cross-import?
needs_review.reason: Plan §4.2 mentions reusing API helper as an option. Either approach is acceptable; the helper signature is small and well-defined. Codegen will choose; no behavioral risk.

needs_review.question: Toast assertion uses .n-message filter on has_text='成功'. Tolerant by design; does reviewer prefer stricter exact-text match per case?
needs_review.reason: Stricter matches risk false negatives if Naive UI tweaks message. Plan §8 documents the tolerance choice. Recommend keep.
